{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Executive",
  "description": "Geoinfotech -&nbsp;No 1 Industry leader in GIS and Drone Company in Nigeria. We provide Land survey, Drone, survey Inspection and mapping services. Complete Geographic Information System (GIS), Remote Sensing and web application services for Agriculture, Infrastructure, Transportation, Marine, Govt, Oil and Gas, Business, Telecom, Utilities, Banks and much more.

Geospatial data processing of aerial surveying, Mobile and web app programming, analysis and mapping, providing accurate data and transforming real-world scenarios into digital assets, to smart design and modeling. Our Services includes GIS and Remote Sensing, Website Application, Drone Services, Web Mapping Consultancy and training

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Business Development Executive will be responsible for identifying new business opportunities, building and maintaining client relationships, and driving revenue growth for the company.
	The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of technology-driven services such as GIS, drone operations, and digital mapping solutions.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities in target industries (Oil &amp; Gas, Agriculture, Government, Telecom, etc.)
	Generate leads and convert them into profitable business deals
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients and stakeholders
	Promote company services including GIS, Remote Sensing, Drone Services, Web Mapping, and Application Development
	Prepare and deliver compelling presentations and proposals to clients
	Conduct market research to identify trends and customer needs
	Collaborate with technical teams to ensure client requirements are met
	Negotiate contracts and close deals to achieve sales targets
	Represent the company at industry events, exhibitions, and networking platforms
	Maintain accurate records of sales activities and client interactions


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Geography, Geoinformatics, or related field
	Proven experience in business development, sales, or a related role
	Knowledge of GIS, Drone Technology, or Geospatial services is an added advantage
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Ability to understand technical services and present them to non-technical clients
	Self-motivated, target-driven, and result-oriented
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and CRM tools


Key Skills:


	Sales &amp; Marketing Strategy
	Client Relationship Management
	Lead Generation &amp; Conversion
	Negotiation &amp; Closing Skills
	Market Research &amp; Analysis
	Presentation &amp; Communication Skills
	Strategic Thinking
	Performance Indicators (KPIs)
	Revenue growth and sales targets achieved
	Number of new clients acquired
	Client retention rate
	Successful project conversions


Market expansion and partnerships

Salary
N100,0000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;geoinfo.techs@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-05",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Geoinfotech"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {

  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

Business Development Executive Job at Geoinfotech




        
    

        
        Geoinfotech - No 1 Industry leader in GIS and Drone Company in Nigeria. We provide Land survey, Drone, survey Inspection and mapping services. Complete Geographic Information System (GIS), Remote Sensing and web application services for Agriculture, Infrastructure, Transportation, Marine, Govt, Oil and Gas, Business, Telecom, Utilities, Banks and much more.

Geospatial data processing of aerial surveying, Mobile and web app programming, analysis and mapping, providing accurate data and transforming real-world scenarios into digital assets, to smart design and modeling. Our Services includes GIS and Remote Sensing, Website Application, Drone Services, Web Mapping Consultancy and training
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Business Development Executive will be responsible for identifying new business opportunities, building and maintaining client relationships, and driving revenue growth for the company.
	The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of technology-driven services such as GIS, drone operations, and digital mapping solutions.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities in target industries (Oil & Gas, Agriculture, Government, Telecom, etc.)
	Generate leads and convert them into profitable business deals
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients and stakeholders
	Promote company services including GIS, Remote Sensing, Drone Services, Web Mapping, and Application Development
	Prepare and deliver compelling presentations and proposals to clients
	Conduct market research to identify trends and customer needs
	Collaborate with technical teams to ensure client requirements are met
	Negotiate contracts and close deals to achieve sales targets
	Represent the company at industry events, exhibitions, and networking platforms
	Maintain accurate records of sales activities and client interactions


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Geography, Geoinformatics, or related field
	Proven experience in business development, sales, or a related role
	Knowledge of GIS, Drone Technology, or Geospatial services is an added advantage
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Ability to understand technical services and present them to non-technical clients
	Self-motivated, target-driven, and result-oriented
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and CRM tools


Key Skills:


	Sales & Marketing Strategy
	Client Relationship Management
	Lead Generation & Conversion
	Negotiation & Closing Skills
	Market Research & Analysis
	Presentation & Communication Skills
	Strategic Thinking
	Performance Indicators (KPIs)
	Revenue growth and sales targets achieved
	Number of new clients acquired
	Client retention rate
	Successful project conversions


Market expansion and partnerships

Salary
N100,0000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Property Consultant (Beginners and Experienced)",
  "description": "The Pillars Realty Limited is a trusted, value-driven real estate firm built on integrity and excellence, dedicated to helping individuals and investors alike achieve their property dreams,from finding the perfect home to securing high-value assets that build wealth and lasting legacy.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Property Consultant (Beginners and Experienced)

Job Location:&nbsp;Airport road, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	The Pillars Realty Limited is expanding, and we are building a team of high-performance Property Consultants to consult premium properties across Abuja.
	Whether you&rsquo;re just starting out or already experienced in real estate &mdash; this is your opportunity to grow, earn, and build a solid career.


Responsibilities


	Promote and sell verified real estate properties in Abuja
	Generate and manage client leads (online &amp; offline)
	Build strong relationships with clients and investors
	Close deals and earn attractive commissions
	Represent the brand with confidence and professionalism


Who we are looking for


	Good communication and persuasion skills
	Smart, proactive, and result-driven mindset
	Willingness to learn (training will be provided)
	Real estate experience is an advantage (not compulsory)
	Must be based in Abuja.


What you will get


	Base Salary (guaranteed)
	High Commission on every deal closed
	Performance bonuses and incentives
	Training, mentorship &amp; growth opportunities
	Opportunity to earn ?300k &ndash; ?1M+ monthly
	Assignment of personal vehicles.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their name, location, and CV (if available) via WhatsApp to:&nbsp;+2347077077435.
Or
Send their Applications to:&nbsp;thepillarsrealty@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Limited Slots Available
	We are only selecting a few serious and committed individuals.
	If you&rsquo;re ready to earn, grow, and win in real estate &mdash; apply now.

Property Consultant (Beginners and Experienced) Job at Pillars Realty Limited




        
    

        
        The Pillars Realty Limited is a trusted, value-driven real estate firm built on integrity and excellence, dedicated to helping individuals and investors alike achieve their property dreams,from finding the perfect home to securing high-value assets that build wealth and lasting legacy.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Property Consultant (Beginners and Experienced)

Job Location: Airport road, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Pillars Realty Limited is expanding, and we are building a team of high-performance Property Consultants to consult premium properties across Abuja.
	Whether you’re just starting out or already experienced in real estate — this is your opportunity to grow, earn, and build a solid career.


Responsibilities


	Promote and sell verified real estate properties in Abuja
	Generate and manage client leads (online & offline)
	Build strong relationships with clients and investors
	Close deals and earn attractive commissions
	Represent the brand with confidence and professionalism


Who we are looking for


	Good communication and persuasion skills
	Smart, proactive, and result-driven mindset
	Willingness to learn (training will be provided)
	Real estate experience is an advantage (not compulsory)
	Must be based in Abuja.


What you will get


	Base Salary (guaranteed)
	High Commission on every deal closed
	Performance bonuses and incentives
	Training, mentorship & growth opportunities
	Opportunity to earn ?300k – ?1M+ monthly
	Assignment of personal vehicles.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their name, location, and CV (if available) via WhatsApp to: +2347077077435.
Or
Send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Limited Slots Available
	We are only selecting a few serious and committed individuals.
	If you’re ready to earn, grow, and win in real estate — apply now.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cards and Electronic Transaction Officer",
  "description": "Source Microfinance Bank is a digital bank with a focus on how to serve you better always! At Source Credit, we have our plans to serve you better right at the center of all we do, and our service offerings. We also ensure we give the best customer service experience that is tailored just for you. Source Microfinance Bank is poised to change the face of banking in Nigeria. We are reinventing banking to empower a generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Cards and Electronic Transaction Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Job Type:&nbsp;Full-Time

Job Description


	Card Product Development: Overseeing the design and launch of new card products (e.g., credit&nbsp;cards, prepaid cards, fuel cards) that meet customer needs and align with market trends.&nbsp;
	Card Operations Management: Ensuring the smooth day-to-day operation of card services,&nbsp;including card issuance, activation, and maintenance, as well as handling any technical issues&nbsp;related to card processing.
	Compliance and Risk Management: Ensuring all card-related services and transactions comply&nbsp;with regulatory requirements (such as PCI DSS standards) and managing risks related to fraud,&nbsp;data breaches, and misuse of card services.&nbsp;
	Vendor and Partnership Management: Liaising with external vendors, like card manufacturers,&nbsp;and service providers for card processing (e.g., Mastercard, Visa), and managing partnerships for&nbsp;co-branded or white-label card products.&nbsp;
	Customer Support and Issue Resolution: Handling escalated customer complaints related to&nbsp;cards, including fraud issues, lost or stolen cards, and technical problems.&nbsp;
	Card Analytics and Reporting: Monitoring the performance of card products by analyzing data&nbsp;on usage, transaction volume, and customer satisfaction to identify trends and areas for&nbsp;improvement.&nbsp;
	Strategic Planning: Developing strategies to grow card product usage, enhance profitability, and&nbsp;improve the overall customer experience.&nbsp;
	Cross-Department Collaboration: Working closely with other teams like marketing, IT,&nbsp;compliance, and customer service to ensure the success of card programs and services.&nbsp;


Requirements


	Business related degree&nbsp;
	5 years card management experience in the financial services sector&nbsp;
	Proven experience of managing effective and efficient completion of debit and credit cards&nbsp;processing functions and support &nbsp; &nbsp;
	Proven experience in management of cards business project&nbsp;
	Proven experience development and management of strategic partnerships to grow card&nbsp;business&nbsp;
	Highly efficient cross-functional team management&nbsp;
	Sound planning and organizational skills with ability to work with minimal supervision &nbsp;
	Active Listening and Communication Skills.&nbsp;
	Time management skill.&nbsp;
	Technical skill and effective use of Microsoft office (Excel, PowerPoint Teams e.t.c)&nbsp;
	Experience in use of core bank application/solution is compulsory.&nbsp;
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-06",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-07",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Source Microfinance Bank"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "197011"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Cards and Electronic Transaction Officer Job at Source Microfinance Bank




        
    

        
        Source Microfinance Bank is a digital bank with a focus on how to serve you better always! At Source Credit, we have our plans to serve you better right at the center of all we do, and our service offerings. We also ensure we give the best customer service experience that is tailored just for you. Source Microfinance Bank is poised to change the face of banking in Nigeria. We are reinventing banking to empower a generation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cards and Electronic Transaction Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-Time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Card Product Development: Overseeing the design and launch of new card products (e.g., credit cards, prepaid cards, fuel cards) that meet customer needs and align with market trends. 
	Card Operations Management: Ensuring the smooth day-to-day operation of card services, including card issuance, activation, and maintenance, as well as handling any technical issues related to card processing.
	Compliance and Risk Management: Ensuring all card-related services and transactions comply with regulatory requirements (such as PCI DSS standards) and managing risks related to fraud, data breaches, and misuse of card services. 
	Vendor and Partnership Management: Liaising with external vendors, like card manufacturers, and service providers for card processing (e.g., Mastercard, Visa), and managing partnerships for co-branded or white-label card products. 
	Customer Support and Issue Resolution: Handling escalated customer complaints related to cards, including fraud issues, lost or stolen cards, and technical problems. 
	Card Analytics and Reporting: Monitoring the performance of card products by analyzing data on usage, transaction volume, and customer satisfaction to identify trends and areas for improvement. 
	Strategic Planning: Developing strategies to grow card product usage, enhance profitability, and improve the overall customer experience. 
	Cross-Department Collaboration: Working closely with other teams like marketing, IT, compliance, and customer service to ensure the success of card programs and services. 


Requirements


	Business related degree 
	5 years card management experience in the financial services sector 
	Proven experience of managing effective and efficient completion of debit and credit cards processing functions and support    
	Proven experience in management of cards business project 
	Proven experience development and management of strategic partnerships to grow card business 
	Highly efficient cross-functional team management 
	Sound planning and organizational skills with ability to work with minimal supervision  
	Active Listening and Communication Skills. 
	Time management skill. 
	Technical skill and effective use of Microsoft office (Excel, PowerPoint Teams e.t.c) 
	Experience in use of core bank application/solution is compulsory. 
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal / Executive Assistant to the Founder",
  "description": "Cogent Properties Limited is a Lagos-based real estate development and construction company led by a team of built-environment professionals. We develop residential and commercial properties, manage construction projects end-to-end, and operate a growing portfolio of completed developments.

We are a technology-forward company that prioritises digital systems, structured processes, and operational accountability across all our sites and businesses. We are growing our team and looking for driven, detail-oriented professionals who want to build real things in real estate and construction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal / Executive&nbsp;Assistant to the Founder

Job Location:&nbsp;Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

The Opportunity


	A founder operating across real estate development, construction, digital education, and content creation is looking for a Personal Assistant who can become the operational backbone behind a fast-moving, multi-entity operation.
	This is not admin work. This is a high-intensity partnership with someone who builds real projects, teaches hundreds of thousands of people online, runs live events, manages brand partnerships, and is scaling aggressively. You will be embedded in everything &mdash; calendar, communications, travel, events, and the countless moving pieces that come with running multiple businesses simultaneously.


What You&#39;ll Do


	Own and manage a dynamic calendar across professional and personal commitments &mdash; prioritizing ruthlessly so the Founder&#39;s time goes only to the highest-value activities.
	Act as gatekeeper &mdash; triage emails, DMs, partnership requests, and meeting invitations. Only signal reaches the Founder; noise dies with you.
	Draft clear, professional responses on behalf of the Founder to partners, clients, team members, and media contacts.
	Coordinate weekly syncs covering content production, marketing campaigns, construction project milestones, event planning, and speaking engagements.
	Manage all travel &mdash; domestic and international &mdash; with layered contingencies and zero missed details. The Founder travels with family; plan accordingly.
	Coordinate events, dinners, and conference appearances with polish and foresight.
	Support media and marketing execution &mdash; website launches, product launches, post-launch follow-through.
	Step in wherever needed &mdash; solving problems, anticipating needs, and eliminating friction before you&#39;re asked.


What Success Looks Like


	The Founder&#39;s calendar always reflects top priorities. Distractions are eliminated before they arrive.

	Agendas, materials, and follow-ups are ready before they&#39;re needed.
	Every trip runs flawlessly. Every event is coordinated end-to-end.
	You build systems that prevent chaos &mdash; not systems that require reminders.

	Must have graduated with a degree in a construction-related course&mdash; Quantity Surveying, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Building Technology, Estate Management, or similar. 	Exceptional written and verbal communication &mdash; concise, direct, and context-aware.
	Impeccable discretion and integrity with sensitive business and personal information.
	High emotional intelligence and composure under pressure.
	Strong problem-solving instincts and ownership mentality &mdash; you anticipate, not react.
	Fast response time. You move in real time, not on delay.
	Ability to operate seamlessly across professional and personal domains without overstepping.
	Resilience in a high-standards, fast-changing environment.


Do Not Apply If:


	You need constant direction or hand-holding.

	You prioritize &quot;done&quot; over &quot;done right.&quot;

Personal / Executive Assistant to the Founder Job at Cogent Properties Limited




        
    

        
        Cogent Properties Limited is a Lagos-based real estate development and construction company led by a team of built-environment professionals. We develop residential and commercial properties, manage construction projects end-to-end, and operate a growing portfolio of completed developments.

We are a technology-forward company that prioritises digital systems, structured processes, and operational accountability across all our sites and businesses. We are growing our team and looking for driven, detail-oriented professionals who want to build real things in real estate and construction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
